title: Motor overheating Unit A7
symptom: Temperature exceeded 92C during normal operation
root_cause: Thermal margin insufficient at ambient 40C, cooling path blocked by dust accumulation
fix_applied: Increased PWM duty cycle by 15%, added dust filter, redesigned airflow path

title: Voltage spike PCB-3
symptom: Voltage spike to 14.2V on 12V rail
root_cause: Bulk capacitor C4 degraded, insufficient hold-up during transient
fix_applied: Replaced C4 with higher ESR spec, added TVS diode on 12V rail

title: Vibration anomaly conveyor motor
symptom: Unusual vibration 3.2x above baseline at 1800 RPM
root_cause: Rotor imbalance due to bearing wear, resonance at 1800 RPM
fix_applied: Replaced bearing, dynamic balancing, added vibration damper mount

title: Thermal runaway embedded controller
symptom: CPU temperature reached 105C causing shutdown
root_cause: Thermal paste dried after 18 months, contact resistance increased 40%
fix_applied: Reapplied thermal compound, alert at 85C, scheduled maintenance every 12 months

title: PWM duty cycle instability
symptom: PWM signal dropping below threshold at high load
root_cause: Gate driver bootstrap capacitor undersized for high frequency switching
fix_applied: Replaced bootstrap cap with 100nF ceramic, added snubber circuit

title: Cooling system pressure drop
symptom: Coolant pressure dropped 40% under full load
root_cause: Pump impeller cavitation at high temperature, coolant viscosity too low
fix_applied: Switched to higher viscosity coolant, reduced operating temperature setpoint by 5C

title: Capacitor failure power board
symptom: Electrolytic capacitor bulging, ripple voltage 800mV
root_cause: Ripple current exceeds capacitor rating at full load, temperature derating not applied
fix_applied: Replaced with higher ripple current rating, added parallel capacitors

title: Sensor drift temperature probe
symptom: Temperature sensor reading 8C above actual value
root_cause: Self-heating error at high current, not isolated from PCB heat source
fix_applied: Added calibration correction, repositioned sensor away from heat source

title: Overcurrent protection tripping
symptom: OCP triggers at 85% of rated load unexpectedly
root_cause: Current sense resistor tolerance shift due to temperature coefficient drift
fix_applied: Replaced with 0.1% tolerance resistor, recalibrated OCP threshold with 10% margin

title: IGBT thermal stress failure
symptom: IGBT junction temperature exceeded 150C at peak load
root_cause: Thermal impedance calculation error in design, peak transient not accounted for
fix_applied: Added heatsink fin extension, thermal simulation updated, derated peak current 10%

title: Fan bearing wear detected
symptom: Acoustic signature shows bearing degradation at 2400 RPM
root_cause: Fan operating beyond rated speed due to firmware bug in speed control loop
fix_applied: Fixed PID tuning in speed controller, added speed limiter, replaced bearing

title: Ground loop interference
symptom: 50Hz noise on analog signal lines affecting ADC readings
root_cause: Star ground not implemented, analog and digital grounds sharing return path
fix_applied: Redesigned PCB ground plane with star topology, added ferrite bead on analog supply

title: Thermal paste degradation
symptom: Thermal resistance increased 40% from baseline
root_cause: Low quality thermal paste, pump-out effect after thermal cycling
fix_applied: Replaced with phase change thermal pad, added mechanical retention clip

title: Motor winding insulation failure
symptom: Insulation resistance dropped to 2 MOhm at 500V
root_cause: Moisture ingress through cable gland, insulation class not rated for high humidity
fix_applied: Upgraded to Class H insulation, sealed all cable entries with IP67 glands

title: Firmware watchdog reset loop
symptom: System rebooting every 45 minutes under heavy load
root_cause: Memory leak in CAN bus receive buffer handler, heap exhausted after 45 min
fix_applied: Fixed buffer free in interrupt handler, added memory monitoring, heap guard implemented

title: High temperature shutdown recurring
symptom: System shutting down at 88C, rated for 100C
root_cause: Thermal sensor placed near hot spot rather than average temperature zone
fix_applied: Pending redesign of sensor placement

title: Overheating at ambient 45C
symptom: System fails thermal test at 45C ambient, passes at 40C
root_cause: Thermal design margin only 5C above ambient, insufficient for field deployment
fix_applied: Pending thermal redesign, evaluating forced air cooling upgrade

title: DC bus voltage collapse
symptom: DC bus drops from 400V to 280V under peak load
root_cause: Capacitor bank undersized, energy storage insufficient for peak demand transient
fix_applied: Added parallel capacitor bank, increased total capacitance from 2200uF to 4400uF

title: Coolant leak at pump seal
symptom: Coolant leaking from pump shaft seal after 6 months
root_cause: Seal material not compatible with glycol-water mixture at elevated temperature
fix_applied: Replaced with EPDM seal rated for glycol, updated maintenance interval to 6 months

title: Motor bearing lubrication failure
symptom: Bearing temperature 35C above ambient, noise increased
root_cause: Grease purged from bearing at high speed, re-lubrication interval too long
fix_applied: Installed automatic lubrication system, reduced re-lube interval from 12 to 6 months
